author: @okayaresd
comment_text: ​ @sweetysavvy  Well, first of all I never understood these ads tbh, it's always portraying these things as if men are vile creatures who dwell in unhygienic environments and somehow entrap a woman who fixes them up. Many guys like me leave their homes at 17-18 and are encouraged to learn all the life skills, cooking, cleaning, paying bills, managing expenses back home and also working simultaneously, I learned it from my father tbh, he is in sixties and still does everything at home whenever he has the time while my mother manages the homefront. He told us the importance of survival, and how not to depend on ANYONE.    I know there are men (and some women) who are pampered into a comfortable life, they don't learn, or feel too inferior to these things. Such people when faced with resistance crack like an egg. But believe me, most men I know would love to do laundry, and cook hot meals for their loved ones. Besides, stay away from dating such people.   P.S- Also who dafaq does laundry at night? Clothes will stink!

author: @sweetysavvy
comment_text: @okayaresd  That's amazing to know! I too firmly believe that cooking, cleaning, etc. are survival skills and not a gender-specific role. If you are a grown up adult, you should be able to do all this on your own. However, the majority out there fail to see it like this and get insecure at the idea of a woman doing a man's job and vice versa. There are people who truly believe that society was its best when gender roles were defined like this. I guess this ad is targeted towards that demographic.

author: @yogeshthakurhp36
comment_text: Dear Hero Customer Support,  I hope this message finds you well.  As you know that almost 7days gone and my bike is not replaced or not delivered till now with engine change  I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction and concern regarding a serious issue with my recently purchased Hero bike. Despite adhering to the recommended maintenance schedule and proper usage, I have encountered significant problems with the engine seals at just 2560 kilometers.  Bike Details: - Model: xtreem 125R - Purchase Date: 21-5-2024 - Current Mileage: 2560 km - Dealer: Jyoti Auto mobile (Una Himachal Pradesh)  The premature failure of the engine has not only caused me considerable inconvenience but also raises serious questions about the quality and reliability of the bike. This issue has left me feeling harassed and extremely frustrated, especially given the high standards typically associated with the Hero brand.  Given the severity of the problem at such an early stage, I kindly request one of the following resolutions: 1. A complete replacement of the bike with a new one of the same model. 2. A complete engine change to address the defect permanently.  Should this matter not be resolved promptly and satisfactorily, I will be left with no choice but to escalate this issue. This will include filing a complaint with the consumer court and sharing my experience across various social media platforms to inform other potential customers about the issue I have faced.  I trust that Hero values its customers and will address this matter with the urgency it deserves. Please contact me at your earliest convenience to discuss the next steps. I can be reached at 9805426247 or via email.  Thank you for your immediate attention to this pressing matter. I look forward to your prompt response.  Sincerely,  Yogesh Kumar Vill Badhal Maira PO Jandaur Teh Jaswan Distt kangra HP 177111 9805426247

author: @ExBnk_Trader
comment_text: Subject: Complaint Regarding Poor Customer Service and Unjust Account Rejection at HDFC CIDCO Connaught Branch, Aurangabad. Dear Sir/Madam,   I am writing to express my deep dissatisfaction and frustration with the service I received at the HDFC CIDCO Connaught branch in Aurangabad during my recent attempts to open a savings account. Despite visiting the branch four times, I encountered unresponsive and uncooperative staff who not only failed to assist me appropriately but also exhibited unprofessional behavior.   Initially, I was informed that the minimum balance required to open an account was ₹10,000, along with the need for an empty cheque. I agreed to these conditions, only to be informed immediately afterward that the minimum balance requirement had been increased to ₹20,000, still with the need for an empty cheque. This abrupt change in conditions, without any prior notice or valid reason, led me to leave the branch without opening an account.   Following this experience, I decided to open a Digital Smart Account and submitted my KYC documents at the same branch. After verifying my original KYC documents and taking my signature on the application, I was assured that my KYC process would be completed within two days. However, upon returning home, I discovered that my digital savings account application had been rejected without any valid reason.   I am highly disappointed by the unprofessional and high-handed behavior of the staff at this branch. Despite visiting the branch four times over the past week, I have never seen the branch head, and the staff's lack of responsiveness and arrogance has been utterly unacceptable. This type of conduct is not only damaging to HDFC Bank's reputation but also detrimental to customer trust and satisfaction.   As HDFC Bank is a leading financial institution, I urge you to take immediate action against the erring staff for rejecting my Smart Account without any justifiable reason. If such behavior continues unchecked, it could severely impact the bank's standing and growth prospects.   I request a thorough investigation into this matter and prompt resolution of my complaint. I look forward to receiving a positive response and appropriate action against the responsible staff to prevent such issues from occurring in the future.   Thank you for your attention to this matter.  Kindly share Head office Email Id .  Sincerely,
